Bash(# The first endpoint exists - let's query it for GeoJSON
curl -sL "https://services1.arcgis.com/qAo1OsXi67t7XgmS/arcgis/rest/services/Food_Inspection_Facilities/FeatureServer/0/query?where=1%3D1&outFields=*&f=json&resultRecordCount=2" | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
if 'error' in data:
    print\('Error:', data['error']\)
else:
    print\('Fields:', [f['name'] for f in data.get\('fields',[]\)]\)
    print\('Count:', len\(data.get\('features',[]\)\)\)
    if data.get\('features'\):
        print\('Sample:', json.dumps\(data['features'][0]['attributes'], indent=2\)[:500]\)
" 2>&1)
